ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Discharged

Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Order Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Tuesday, January 6, 2015:
Dennis Klavdianos, Esq. of glassberg, pollak & associates (415.291.8320) for Plaintiff 251 RHODE ISLAND STREET, LLC;
John Chu, Esq. of Corporate Counsel Law Group, LLP (415.989.5300) for Defendant CHERYL DUCOTE DBA CDC ADVISORS.

The Court, having reviewed the briefs submitted and having heard oral argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CHERYL DUCOTE'S Motion For Order Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment is Denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (501)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHERYL DUCOTE'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is off calendar as to Department 302. The matter should be re-set in Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court. (See SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hrg Date For Default Judgmnt Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Robert Brian F. Kram, Esq. Appearing for Plaintiff 251 Rhode Island Street, LLC.
Witness Katherine Rudolph Darling sworn and examinded.

No appearance by defaulted defendant CHRYL DUCOTE, dba CDC ADVISORS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $122,566.00
Attorney's Fees $4,500.00
Costs $475.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $127,541.00.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Continued To Nov-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
